_comment: OWNER ALLOWLIST: only pieces listed here exist in the store, in this order. category: 'wear' | 'paper' drives the tabs. sized=true renders XS-XL. Art paths live in /public. Copy is placard voice (design P{} verbatim).

pieces.name: Goggle Rabbit
pieces.desc: The easiest yes on the page. Ten centimetres of waterproof goggle rabbit, cut to the line.
pieces.meta: 0.3mm pen · scanned once · matte waterproof vinyl

pieces.name: Kaleido Plate
pieces.desc: One drawing, mirrored until it hums. Printed on cotton rag, numbered in pencil at the corner.
pieces.meta: india ink + watercolor · 310gsm cotton rag · numbered edition of 40

pieces.name: Trippy 1.1
pieces.desc: This month’s drawing. One continuous pour of rose on crimson. Printed front and centre, once, never again.
pieces.meta: ink line, colored digitally · water-based print · 100% heavyweight cotton
pieces.note: i let the line walk and followed it.

pieces.name: Pink Rabbit
pieces.desc: The rabbit gone rosy, chest-printed on brushed french terry. Soft enough to sleep in, loud enough not to.
pieces.meta: brush + ink, colored digitally · water-based print · french terry

pieces.name: Bloom Study no.4
pieces.desc: Not a print. The actual sheet of paper the ink touched. Signed, sleeved, shipped flat. One buyer, one wall.
pieces.meta: india ink + gouache on cold-press · 35×35cm · signed original
pieces.note: i can’t make another. that’s the point.
